channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: Republican Support for Netanyahu Declines Sharply
item.description: Republican backing for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has fallen significantly in the past month, following public criticism from President Donald Trump.

item.title: National Security Scandal: Anti-Trump Jack Smith Team Violated Classified Info Rules
A Look Inside the America 250th Time Capsule Buried in Philadelphia
item.description: Congress buried a time capsule near Independence Hall in Philadelphia to mark America's 250th anniversary, sealed until the year 2276.

item.title: Mike Rowe Says History Shows Why Americans Keep Rejecting Socialism
item.description: Mike Rowe suggests Americans who lack pride in the U.S. may need a history lesson or a visit to other nations on America's 250th anniversary.
